The Bye Bye Man (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,395,806Details
International Box Office $8,791,921
Worldwide Box Office $31,187,727
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,248,274
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $785,851
Total $2,034,125
Further financial details...

Synopsis

People commit unthinkable acts every day. Time and again, we grapple to understand what drives a person to do such terrible things. But what if all of the questions we’re asking are wrong? What if the cause of all evil is not a matter of what…but who?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,501,349 (60.3% of total gross)
Legs:1.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,400,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,220 opening theaters/2,220 max. theaters, 2.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,861,070

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 13th, 2017 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: January 13th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
January 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
January 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Belgium)
January 13th, 2017 (Wide), released as O Nome do Medo (Portugal)
January 17th, 2017 (Wide), released as Bijok jo vardo (Lithuania)
Video Release: April 11th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, horror violence, bloody images, sexual content, thematic elements, partial nudity, some language and teen drinking.
(Rating bulletin 2447 (Cert #50397), 10/19/2016)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Haunted House, Possessed, Spree Killer
Social setting: College, Supernatural
Source material: Based on an UNTRUE Story
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Huayi Brothers Pictures Ltd, Intrepid Pictures, Los Angeles Media Fund
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
